name: Ferplast Club Collar C25/70 Black
shortDescription: The Ferplast Club Collar C25/70 in black is a robust, adjustable nylon collar designed for medium to large dogs. Combining strength, comfort, and a timeless minimalistic design, it’s perfect for daily walks, training, and general use.
description: Why Choose the C25/70 Club Collar? • Built for daily use – tough yet lightweight construction. • Fully adjustable to adapt as your dog grows or if their coat thickness changes. • Easy to maintain and clean – ideal for active dogs who love outdoor adventures. • Timeless design works for any breed or personality. Part of Ferplast’s Club range, the C25/70 delivers everything you need in a dependable dog collar – strength, comfort, and a clean style that never goes out of fashion. Whether you’re looking for a collar for everyday walks or a reliable training accessory, this collar is a practical and stylish choice for your dog.
